description: A man in a blue t-shirt and black shorts sits on the edge of a pool with his legs dangling in the water. He is wearing a blue baseball cap and sunglasses. He is reaching out his hand towards a seal that is partially submerged in the turquoise water. The pool area has a light blue concrete edge and bright blue walls. There is a metal railing in the foreground. The seal appears to be interacting with the man's hand, with water splashing around it. The scene suggests an animal encounter or show at a zoo or marine park.
location_context: An enclosure with a pool, possibly a zoo or marine park, with blue walls.
time_context: Daytime, suggested by bright lighting and clear water.
